sources.name: Internal corpus
build: read tests/qasm_solver_corpus.json directly; compute max_imported_nvars via qasm2sop on each boundary

sources.name: FeynmanDD
build: python3 tools/build_external_qasm_manifest.py build/qasm2sop <root> --source-name FeynmanDD --source-url https://github.com/cqs-thu/feynman-decision-diagram --source-prefix feynmandd --strip-terminal-measurements --inline-simple-gates --boundaries zero-and-one --min-vars 0 --max-vars 512

sources.name: PyZX
build: python3 tools/build_external_qasm_manifest.py build/qasm2sop <root>/circuits --source-name PyZX --source-url https://github.com/zxcalc/pyzx --source-prefix pyzx --include-qc --qc2qasm tools/qc2qasm.py --boundaries zero-and-one --min-vars 0 --max-vars 512

sources.name: MQT Bench
build: python3 tools/build_external_qasm_manifest.py build/qasm2sop <work_dir>/mqt_qasm --source-name 'MQT Bench' --source-url https://github.com/munich-quantum-toolkit/bench --source-prefix mqt --boundaries zero-and-one --min-vars 0 --max-vars 512
